step_1_capture_state.method: Read D11 AAR shape (319 lines; 11 sections + §11 RLP) as canonical template; gather cycle commit SHAs + line-count deltas from M5.5 S1-S3 git log; draft 11 sections + §11 5-persona RLP matrix per M5.0 §3 D14 row allocation

Sections: §1 Mission Identity + §2 Scorecard (cycle-level 10/10 + AC-level 15/15) + §3 Gap Register (5 low) + §4 Technical Debt (5 entries) + §5 Readiness Assessment (9 criteria all GO) + §6 Recommendation (M5.6 D15) + §7 Lessons Learned (12 entries) + §8 Token-budget two-metric + §9 Standing Order discharges (project SO 1-10 + campaign SO 11-19) + §10 Pattern disposition (2 graduations + 16 NEW SEEDS + 7 post-graduation reinforcements + 0 invariant violations) + §11 Reviewer Lens Pass (5-persona aggregate 4.75/5.0).

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated 5-question Q&A — full 5-persona Reviewer Lens Pass per Campaign Standing Order #11 + M5.0 §3 D14 row allocation. All 5 personas read writing-guidelines.mdx §1 + cycle 128 .github/README_STYLE_GUIDE.md before scoring.
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: M5.0 10-dimension persona × dimension matrix — 6 primary (Visual_Clarity + Comprehension + Findability + Cognitive_Load + Conciseness + Explanation_Quality) + 4 secondary (Trust + Delight + Newcomer_Time_to_First_Success NEW + Visual_Hierarchy_Adherence)
